description_long: This object is a small, lifelike bird with a predominantly vibrant green plumage, accented by darker patches and subtle hints of lighter green. The body is elongated and streamlined, with a smooth, slightly curved back and a tapered tail. The head is rounded, featuring a short, conical beak and small, pale eye patches that stand out against the green feathers. The wings are folded tightly against the body, displaying faint black markings and a layered feather texture. The tail is relatively short and appears slightly squared at the tip, blending seamlessly with the rest of the body. The overall appearance suggests a parrot or parakeet commonly found in urban parks and gardens.
description: A small, green bird with dark markings, a short conical beak, and a streamlined body, resembling a parakeet or parrot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated green body, folded wings with dark markings, and rounded head with a pale eye patch.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the layered feather texture on the back and tail, with dark and green coloration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same green plumage, dark wing markings, and the smooth, streamlined body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short conical beak, and subtle facial features.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid green with darker patches and faint black wing markings
